title: Atmino

"''Forcibly retired.|[[Krinkins]] and Atmino to [[Daric LaRone]]|[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']]}} '''Atmino''', a [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]] and [[Senior officer/Legends|senior officer]], was one of the honest [[Police officer/Legends|patrollers]] of [[Janusar]] who was forcibly retired when [[Cav'Saran]] took over. ==Biography== In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], he encountered a former stormtrooper named [[Daric LaRone]], who deputized him to take over when the [[Hand of Judgment]] overthrew Cav'Saran. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] {{Ab|Allegiance (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Atmino#legends |pl=Atmino }} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Police]]
